deepseek-pilot.command.setVisionModel: DeepSeek Pilot: Set Vision Proxy Model
deepseek-pilot.command.showCacheStats: DeepSeek Pilot: Show Reasoning Cache Stats
deepseek-pilot.command.showContextWindow: DeepSeek Pilot: Show Context Window Details
deepseek-pilot.command.setUtilityModel: DeepSeek Pilot: Use as Copilot Utility Model
deepseek-pilot.command.setUtilitySmallMo: DeepSeek Pilot: Use as Copilot Utility Small Model
deepseek-pilot.config.title: DeepSeek Pilot
deepseek-pilot.config.maxTokens: Maximum output tokens per request. 0 = API default (no limit).
deepseek-pilot.config.reasoningEffort: Reasoning effort for `(thinking)` model variants. Has no effect on non-thinking variants.
deepseek-pilot.config.reasoningEffort.hi: Faster responses with shorter reasoning chains.
deepseek-pilot.config.reasoningEffort.ma: Maximum reasoning depth; slower and uses more tokens.
deepseek-pilot.config.modelIdOverrides: Optional API model ID overrides for DeepSeek-compatible proxy endpoints.
deepseek-pilot.config.modelIdOverrides.f: API model ID to use for DeepSeek V4 Flash variants.
deepseek-pilot.config.modelIdOverrides.p: API model ID to use for DeepSeek V4 Pro variants.
deepseek-pilot.config.visionModel: Model ID for vision proxy (describes images for text-only DeepSeek). Leave empty for auto-detection. Use 'DeepSeek Pilot: Set Vision Proxy Model' to pick from a list.
deepseek-pilot.config.visionPrompt: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments.
deepseek-pilot.config.contextWarnThresho: Percent of the model's context window at which the context-window status bar item turns yellow (warning). Below this, the indicator stays neutral and advises against compacting — DeepSeek's KV cache makes compaction expensive when there's still room.
deepseek-pilot.config.contextCriticalThr: Percent of the model's context window at which the context-window status bar item turns red (critical) and recommends compacting immediately to avoid truncation. Must be greater than `deepseek-pilot.contextWarnThreshold`.
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.title: DeepSeek Pilot — Setup
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.description: Set up your DeepSeek API key and start using V4 models in Copilot Chat with vision + token tracking.
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step1.title: Set your DeepSeek API key
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step1.descrip:
[Get an API key](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys) from platform.deepseek.com.
[Set API Key](command:deepseek-pilot.setApiKey)
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step2.title: Pick a DeepSeek V4 model
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step2.descrip: Open Copilot Chat and select a DeepSeek V4 variant from the model picker. Four variants available: Pro/Flash × thinking/non-thinking. If they are hidden, use Manage Provider from the picker menu.
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step3.title: Tune reasoning effort (optional)
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step3.descrip: Switch between `high` and `max` for `(thinking)` variants. [Open Reasoning Effort Setting](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22deepseek-pilot.reasoningEffort%22)
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step4.title: Support the project (optional)
deepseek-pilot.walkthrough.step4.descrip: MIT and free. If it helps, [star the repo](https://github.com/setsey/deepseek-pilot) or [sponsor on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/setsey).
deepseek-pilot.quickpick.setUtilitySmall: $(zap) Use as Copilot Utility Small Model
deepseek-pilot.auth.title: DeepSeek API Key
deepseek-pilot.auth.prompt: Paste your DeepSeek API key or compatible proxy bearer token
deepseek-pilot.auth.saved: DeepSeek API key validated and saved.
deepseek-pilot.auth.savedNoValidation: DeepSeek API key saved without successful validation.
deepseek-pilot.error.422: DeepSeek rejected the request schema (422). Likely a host/extension mismatch. {0}
deepseek-pilot.error.429: DeepSeek rate limited (429). The extension already retried — try again in a moment.
deepseek-pilot.error.500: DeepSeek server is having trouble ({0}). The extension already retried — please retry in a moment.
deepseek-pilot.balance.noApiKey: Set your DeepSeek API key first (Command Palette → DeepSeek Pilot: Set API Key).
deepseek-pilot.balance.emptyResponse: DeepSeek returned an empty balance response.
deepseek-pilot.context.noTurns: DeepSeek context window: no turns recorded yet. Send a message first.
deepseek-pilot.context.cacheLowWarning: {0} — low hit rate may cause 400 errors in multi-turn conversations. Try starting a new chat.
deepseek-pilot.stream.capacityError: DeepSeek backend ran out of capacity mid-stream. The response is incomplete — please resend.
deepseek-pilot.stream.truncated: DeepSeek response was truncated (max_tokens limit). Consider increasing `deepseek-pilot.maxTokens`.
deepseek-pilot.vision.noModels: No vision-capable models found. Sign in to GitHub Copilot Chat to enable vision proxy.
deepseek-pilot.vision.placeholder: Pick a model to describe images before sending them to DeepSeek
deepseek-pilot.utility.title.primary: Set Copilot Utility Model (used for titles, summaries, commits, intent)
deepseek-pilot.utility.title.small: Set Copilot Utility Small Model (used for fast, lightweight flows)
deepseek-pilot.utility.failed: Failed to set Copilot utility model: {0}
deepseek-pilot.clearCache.confirm: Clear the persistent DeepSeek reasoning cache? Multi-turn thinking conversations may temporarily fall back to empty reasoning chains on the next reply.
deepseek-pilot.activate.failed: DeepSeek Pilot: Activation failed. Check the output log.
deepseek-pilot.models.noApiKey: No API key configured. Use "DeepSeek Pilot: Manage Provider" or "DeepSeek Pilot: Set API Key".
deepseek-pilot.migrate.complete: DeepSeek Pilot: migrated your existing API key and settings from the previous extension namespace. Old entries cleaned up.
